titleStmt.title: SII 24.126: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 126. (A.R. No. 122 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records an agreement given by Kāśyapaṉ Tiru ••• ttavaṉ perumāḷ alias Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa Brahmārāyaṟ, his brother •••• perumāḷ alias Vīrachōḻa Brahmārāyar and Śiṅgapirāṉ Chakrapāṇi to Poṉ-parappiṉār alias Vaṅgāra Muttaraiyar to cultivate the 2 mā of garden land purchased from Śrī Gōvinda-perumāḷ alias Pagaivali Aṇukka Brahmārāyar and Tiruvāykkulam Uḍaiyāṉ Uttamanambi for 17,000 kāśu. The inscription is dated in the 11th regnal year of Tribhuvaṉachakravartigaḷ Rājarāja who may be identified with Rājarāja II on palaeographical considerations.

The portion containing the details of the date is partly damaged on the stone the last letter of the tithi mi along with the other details viz., the weekday (Saturday) and the nakshatra (Svāti) being clear. If the intended tithi is ba. ashṭami, then the details given viz., 11th year, Saturday and Svātī regularly correspond to A.D. 1157, January 5, Saturday, f.d.t. ·13; f.d.n. ·24. The month was Makara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrī rājarāja devaṟku yāṇṭu [10 1] miyuñ caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ
parā nāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil śrīpātan tāṅku nampimāril kāśyapan tiru ttavanen perumāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa brahmārāyaṉum Iva
r tampi A perumāḷāṉa viracoḻabrahmārāyarum śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷil ciṅkappirāṉ cakrapāṇi nampiyum Immuvom
Aḻakiya perumāḷukkut tirunantavaṉañ ceytu tirumālai yeṭukkak kaṭa vomākavum Ippaṭi ceykaikkuk kāṇiyākak koṇṭu tanta tirunantavaṉattiruk kuṟaippa
ṟṟu vaṭavoḻukil kūrakulottaman tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakku cikovintap peru māḷāṉa pakaivali Aṇukkap brahmārāyar pakkal vilai koṇṭu tanta kuḻi nūṟum I
kiḻakku meṟku nokkip pokiṟa peruvaḻikku vaṭakkut tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyāṉ Uttamanampi pakkal vilai koṇṭu tanta kuḻi nūṟum Āka kuḻi Irunūṟṟiṉāl nilamiraṇṭu māvukkuk kācu
ppatiṉeḻāyiramuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ivviruvaṟkuṅ kuṭuttu Innilamiraṇṭumāvuṅ kaik koṇṭu tirunantavaṉañceytu tirumālai Eṭukkak kaṭavomākavu mittirunanta vaṉañ ceykiṟa peṟku I
var taruñ cīvaṉaṅ koṇṭu Ittirunantavaṉañ cantirātittavarai nāṅkaḷe ceyyak kaṭavomāṉamaikkuk kalveṭṭikkuṭutto mippon parappiṉārāṉa vaṅkāramuttarai yaṟku Immuvvom
Ippaṭikku Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa brahmārāyar Eḻuttu vira(vi)coḻa brahmārāyar Eḻuttu cakrapāṇi nampi Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 24.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
